name: @vaipakam/keeper
description: Vaipakam's first-party autonomous keeper Cloudflare Worker (Stage 3 PR2 + architectural-rebalance commit of the Worker split — see docs/DesignsAndPlans/Stage3WorkerSplitPlan.md). Cron-driven, no HTTP surface. The single Worker that holds KEEPER_PRIVATE_KEY (staging plan §2 least-privilege contract: signing key lives on exactly one Worker). Today: HF watcher loop + autonomous on-chain liquidation submission + Telegram / Push alert dispatch on HF band downgrades + daily oracle snapshot signer (OracleFacet.captureDailyPriceSnapshot, moved from agent). Tomorrow (per RangeOffersDesign.md and §7 of the Stage 3 plan): adds the off-chain offer matcher for the Phase 1 Range Orders + Lender Partial Fills system, submitting matchOffers(lenderId, borrowerId) to earn the 1% LIF matcher fee. Holds privileged secrets (KEEPER_PRIVATE_KEY, ZEROEX_API_KEY, ONEINCH_API_KEY, TG_BOT_TOKEN, PUSH_CHANNEL_PK) in the Cloudflare secret store; never serves user-facing reads. Distinct from the public reference keeper bot at `vaipakam-keeper-bot` (sibling repo) — that one is for third-party operators; this one is the project's own.
